channel.title: art on Joe Peskett
channel.description: Recent content in art on Joe Peskett

item.title: Pretty Pictures with R
item.description: This is a little attempt that I made a while back at doing some “creative coding”/“generative art”. It’s pretty good fun and there are some excellent examples from people that do this much better than I do (check google/twitter). I’d like to have a little more of a play with this kind of project over the next year and, hopefully, can use it as a way to learn some new languages/tools along the way.
